prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次约687→648→475→497名，近两年位次明显前移，2024年跃升至475名后2025年小幅后移至497名，整体竞争加剧趋势明显；202 5年基准约497名；该校在宁夏理科（物理类）招生计划2022–2024年均为18人，2025年缩减至16人，2026年计划17人，较2025年小幅扩招1人，扩幅约6.25 %，竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南开大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第21名（Top20），近年排名稳定在20–23名区间，属于国内顶尖综合性大学。\ n2026年声誉评价为"明显负面"，主要涉及学术不端（院长论文造假被免职）、师德师风等事件，可能对部分考生报考心理产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第36位（ 较热），短视频平台有一定关注度；历史投档异常方面，2022年曾在河南出现断档，但宁夏近年未见明显异常；南开大学拥有化学A+、数学A+、工商管理A+、应 用经济学A+、统计学A等14个A-/A/A+学科，理科招生专业覆盖数学、物理、计算机、电子信息等方向，学科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气 工程等专业2026年社会热度持续高热推荐，与南开理科试验班（数学与大数据）、工科试验班（信息科学与技术）等高度契合；宁夏2026年高考总人数约66000人（含不确定标记 ），按近年物理类占比约67.5%估算约44550人，与2025年44491人基本持平；南开大学位于天津，在宁夏招生占比约2%（2025年 该校全国招生598人中宁夏12人），属跨省招生，无本省偏好优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次497名、2026年计划小幅扩招（16→17）使竞争略有缓解、声誉负面事件 可能轻微抑制报考热度，以及学校顶尖层次和热门专业持续吸引高分考生等多重因素，预计2026年理科最低位次，区间466–586 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 687 → 648 → 475 → 497. In recent years, the ranking has significantly moved forward, with a leap to 475 in 2024 and a slight retreat to 497 in 2025, indicating an overall intensifying competition trend; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 497. The enrollment plan for this university in Ningxia science (physics category) was 18 students each year from 2022 to 2024, reduced to 16 in 2025, and planned at 17 in 2026, a slight increase of 1 student compared to 2025, an expansion of about 6.25%, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nankai University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 21st (Top 20) in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 20–23 range in recent years, belonging to the top-tier comprehensive universities in China. The 2026 reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative', mainly involving academic misconduct (dean's paper fabrication leading to dismissal) and teacher ethics incidents, which may somewhat suppress some candidates' application psychology; Douyin popularity ranks 36th (relatively hot), with some attention on short video platforms; regarding historical admission anomalies, there was a gap in Henan in 2022, but no significant anomalies have been seen in Ningxia in recent years; Nankai University has 14 A-/A/A+ disciplines including Chemistry A+, Mathematics A+, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Statistics A, etc. The science enrollment majors cover mathematics, physics, computer science, electronic information, and other directions, with outstanding disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended in 2026, highly compatible with Nankai's Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Big Data) and Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology); the total number of candidates for the 2026 Ningxia Gaokao is approximately 66,000 (including uncertain marks), estimated at about 44,550 based on the recent physics category proportion of about 67.5%, basically flat with the 44,491 in 2025; Nankai University is located in Tianjin, with a Ningxia enrollment share of about 2% (12 out of 598 national admissions in 2025), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with no local preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 497, the slight expansion in the 2026 plan (16→17) slightly easing competition, the negative reputation incidents possibly mildly suppressing application enthusiasm, and the top-tier level and popular majors continuing to attract high-scoring candidates, the minimum ranking for science in 2026 is expected to be in the range of 466–586.

- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Big Data).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Science Experimental Class (Physics and Optoelectronic Information Technology Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Industry Elite).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 466–586, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology) and Science Experimental Class (Physics and Optoelectronic Information Technology Engineering) as main targets, with Tier 1 Excellence Top Talent Plan Boling Class and Mathematics and Big Data as sprint goals, and Tier 3 Material Science and Future Industry Elite as safety options. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<466), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 102 → 111 → 127, showing a trend of moving backward year by year, with a cumulative backward shift of about 25 positions over the past 3 years; the baseline for 2025 is about 127; the university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Ningxia was 6 in 2023, 9 in 2024, and 16 in 2025, showing an expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 13, a reduction of 3 from 2025, a decrease of about 18.75%, indicating significantly intensified competition.
